'''Kavren''' was a [[Lieutenant/Legends|lieutenant]] in the [[Imperial Army/Legends|Imperial Army]] in the early weeks of its existence.

He served under [[Colonel/Legends|Colonel]] [[Mosh Barris/Legends|Mosh Barris]] on the mission in which the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] first made contact with [[Mitth'raw'nuruodo/Legends|Mitth'raw'nuruodo]] and was in charge of examining the crash site of a downed [[TIE/ln space superiority starfighter/Legends|TIE fighter]].

==Appearances==
*{{JournalCite|7|Mist Encounter|reprint=1}} {{1st}}
